prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含原理科）最低位次依次约4241→3152→10395→6970→5843名，波动剧烈；2023年出现断档至10395名后快速回升，2025年基准约5843名，较20 24年6970名上升约1127名，竞争明显加剧；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划2021年8人、2022年6人、2023年5人、2024年5人、2025年5人，近年呈缩招趋势；202 6年计划仅3人，较2025年减少2人（缩招40%），大幅缩招将显著加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京外国语大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第7 9名，近年排名稳中有升，语言类院校中居全国顶尖地位；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不端与师德师风事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一 定抑制；抖音热度排名第39（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；外国语言文学为A+学科（全国顶尖），覆盖该校英语、俄语等物理类招生专业；计算机科学与技 术（语言智能）虽无单独学科评估，但依托语言智能交叉方向有一定特色。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机/电子信息类专业2024–2026年社会热度持续高热推荐，对物理类考生吸 引力强；黑龙江省2026年普通高考总人数约167000人，按近年物理类占比约68.2%估算约113900人，较2025年117407人略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5843名、2026年大幅缩招40%（仅3人）、考生总数略减、计算机类高热等因素，但缩招 后实际竞争加剧且计算机热度推高报考意愿，预计物理类最低位次约4491名，区间3991–4991名；关键影响因素为招生计划大幅缩减（竞争加剧主因）、计算机类专业高热（推高 报考热度）、考生规模略降（轻微缓解）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 4241 → 3152 → 10395 → 6970 → 5843, showing significant fluctuations; a gap occurred in 2023 dropping to 10395, followed by a rapid recovery, with a baseline of about 5843 in 2025, an increase of approximately 1127 places from 6970 in 2024, indicating intensified competition; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province was 8 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 5 in 2024, and 5 in 2025, showing a recent trend of contraction; the 2026 plan is only 3, a decrease of 2 from 2025 (a 40% reduction), which will significantly intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 79th, with a stable or slightly rising ranking in recent years, holding a top national position among language universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranks 39th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top nationally), covering the university's English, Russian, and other Physics Category enrollment majors; Computer Science and Technology (Language Intelligence) does not have an independent discipline evaluation but has certain characteristics relying on the cross-disciplinary direction of language intelligence.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer/Electronic Information majors have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province general college entrance examination is approximately 167,000, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 68.2% equating to roughly 113,900, a slight decrease from 117,407 in 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5843, a significant 40% reduction in enrollment in 2026 (only 3 places), a slight decrease in total candidates, and high popularity of computer majors, but the actual competition intensifies after the reduction and the high popularity of computer majors boosts application willingness, the estimated lowest ranking for Physics Category is approximately 4491, with a range of 3991–4991; key influencing factors are the substantial reduction in enrollment plan (main cause of intensified competition), high popularity of computer majors (boosting application enthusiasm), and a slight decrease in candidate scale (minor alleviation).

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were approximately 471 → 716 → 1187 → 1027 → 739, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing; after hitting a trough of 1187 in 2023, it rebounded for two consecutive years, with a baseline of about 739 in 2025, an increase of about 288 from 2024, indicating significantly intensified competition; the enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for History Category was 6 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 12 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan remains 12, unchanged from 2025, with a stable plan not adding extra pressure on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is approximately 79th in 2026, with a steady upward trend in recent years (82nd in 2021 → 79th in 2026), ranking among the top in language universities nationwide; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents such as disputes over the academic qualifications of postgraduate entrance exam teachers, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 39th (relatively hot), with above-average short video exposure; in 2023, there was an abnormal signal of a significant drop in admission rankings for minor language majors. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), covering all enrollment majors such as English, Translation, Diplomacy, German, Russian, and French, with outstanding disciplinary strength and sustained appeal to language-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity assessment of foreign language majors in 2024 is generally wait-and-see, overall stable and slightly cold; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 167,000, estimated at about 53,100 based on the recent History Category proportion of about 31.8%, a slight decrease from 54,707 in 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 739, unchanged enrollment plan, slight decrease in candidate numbers, and slightly negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift back from 739 to about 754, with a range of 618–890; key influencing factors are stable enrollment plan (neutral), slight decrease in candidate scale (slightly favorable), and slightly negative reputation (slightly suppressing), with the combined effect causing a slight drop in ranking.
